title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 2 October 2024.

items.title: **Unreal 5.5** Preview 1 Released
bullets: Key features include Megalights - Enables you to use orders of magnitude more lights than ever before—all movable, dynamic, with realistic area shadows and the ability to light volumetric fog. A tech demo showed over over 1,000 shadow-casting lights in real time running on PlayStation 5
Many features have moved to production ready (such as the Skeletal Mesh editor)
New features include a PCG-esque character creator ("Mutable plugin"), Nanite Skeletal Meshes being more readily available .etc
Better curve support in animations / ability to manually select animation data from "choosers"

items.title: Microsoft is discontinuing its **HoloLens** mixed reality headsets
bullets: Microsoft said HoloLens 2 will continue to receive “updates to address critical security issues and software regressions” until December 31, 2027, after which software support will cease.

items.title: TV Show **Secret Level** recreated the** Unreal Tournament (99)** introduction in Unreal Engine 5
Switch emulator **Ryujinx** pulled offline by creator after contact from Nintendo
bullets: The download links and original repo have vanished

"Yesterday, gdkchan was contacted by Nintendo and offered an agreement to stop working on the project, remove the organisation and all related assets he's in control of," co-developer riperiperi explained in the post.

items.title: October’s **PlayStation Plus** Essential games are now live
bullets: WWE 2K24, Dead Space and Doki Doki Literature Club Plus!

items.title: New **Xbox Game Pass** titles for console, PC and Cloud have been revealed
bullets: Arriving:
MLB The Show 24 (Console) – October 2, Game Pass Standard
Open Roads (Console) – October 2, Game Pass Standard
Sifu (Cloud, Console, and PC) – October 2, Game Pass Ultimate, PC Game Pass, Game Pass Standard
Mad Streets (Cloud, Console, and PC) – October 7, Game Pass Ultimate, PC Game Pass, Game Pass Standard
Inscryption (Cloud, Console, and PC) – October 10, Game Pass Ultimate, PC Game Pass, Game Pass Standard
Leaving (October 15th):
Dyson Sphere Program (PC)
Everspace 2 (Cloud, Console, and PC)
From Space (Cloud, Console, and PC)
F1 Manager 2023 (Cloud, Console, and PC)
Scorn (Cloud, Console, and PC)

items.title: **Devolver Digital** launches publishing label **Big Fan Games** for licensed games
bullets: Devolver acquired Good Shepherd—the team responsible for publishing Hellboy Web of the Wyrd and John Wick Hex—back in 2021.
Similar to other indie publishing labels, Big Fan will offer services in finance, PR, marketing, and other key areas.

items.title: **Epic Games** lowers royalty fee for games released simultaneously on **Epic Games Store**
bullets: Prioritise an Epic Games Store release, and your royalties could drop from 5% to 3.5%
Includes mobile and console, as long as the title ships on Epic Game Store before or simultaneously - you can take advantage of the deal

items.title: **Crunchyroll** alumni launch indie publisher **Shorelines Games**
bullets: New label to focus on systems-based titles that "have a very clear narrative throughline"
CEO Kawamura previously was general manager at art products company Too Corporation Americas. He's formerly worked at the likes of Unknown Worlds Entertainment, Perfect World, Crunchyroll, and more.
COO Zha most recently was CEO of marketing agency Infinitize, having previously held roles at Rakuten Viki, Melwood Global, and Crunchyroll as well.

items.title: **Sharkmob London** faces layoffs after game cancelled
bullets: Sharkmob aims to "try and minimise this impact."
Undisclosed amount of people affected
